package.name: hexapod_face
package.description: Hexapod "face" renderer as a ROS2 node. Drives a 256x64 SH1122 OLED directly from a Raspberry Pi (spidev + the kernel GPIO character device), reusing the platform-free eye animation core (EyeAnim/EyeRaster) shared with the ESP32 firmware in this repo. No external GPIO library.
